title: crepis senecioides subsp. filiformis
intro: Crepis senecioides subsp. filiformis, also known as Hawk's-beard or Crepis filiformis, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crepis senecioides subsp. filiformis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as a diuretic. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are traditionally used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
